title: Initial Gastronomic Release
description: Welcome to LuxeBite, a premium gourmet food ordering application crafted for the finest culinary experiences.

features: Premium luxury UI/UX with dark theme, gold accents, and fluid layouts.
Interactive gastronomic menu showcasing Burgers, Pizzas, Elixirs, and Decadent Desserts.
Live Kitchen & Logistics Console for real-time tracking of gourmet orders.
Secure checkout mock-system with strict client and server-side validation.
Hardened state-bound session management and anti-CSRF token verification.
improvements: Enhanced server response times for order generation and state transitions.
